tier_note: Capability is L (full cross-platform contract incl. Windows named pipes). The macOS-iteration executable cut is S (verify unix path + gate + trait seam). Windows body deferred.
risk_reason: Touches the IPC security boundary: 0600 socket perms + SO_PEERCRED peer-uid auth on the MCP daemon. A weakened peer-auth on Windows named pipes / TCP-loopback would expose the cross-session/agent surface.

rigor_applied.iprev_trigger: risk_tier critical (security) -> iprev STRONGLY recommended; opus evaluator
rigor_applied.iprev_schedule: DONE 2026-06-26 (5 rounds, claude/skeptic, APPROVED). Transcript in handoff/REVIEW.md. Siblings proc/desktop/bundle-ci iprev still pending per original parallel-pass plan.

interview_answers.windows_transport_decision: design recommends named-pipe (OS-enforced owner ACL + client SID peer identity, no new dep) over TCP-loopback+token, preserving the Unix SO_PEERCRED security model
interview_answers.macos_cut: implement Unix impl + PlatformListener/PlatformStream trait seam + cfg(unix) gating; keep POSIX FIFOs on Linux/macOS; defer Windows body + FIFO-onto-primitive unification

events.note: proposal+specs+design+implementation+tasks authored; Windows tasks marked deferred; openspec validate --strict passed

events.reason: IPC peer-auth security boundary -> risk_tier critical + mandatory security-reviewer at Mode B

events.note: 5-round adversarial plan review. R1 critical: blocking FIFO approval gate had zero peer-auth. Major security revisions added: un-squattable per-user IPC dir (/run/user/<getuid()>, getpwuid fallback) closing squat-DoS+TOCTOU+forged-FIFO; getuid()-keyed resolver surviving Codex env-stripping; FIFO liveness deny via gui.pid pid+start-time token (flock-owned) + timer-driven non-blocking poll; CI comparison-branch test + committed sudo-u-nobody real-extraction harness against a relaxed-perm test socket (no false-green); hook-socket peer-uid backstop; corrected macOS LOCAL_PEERCRED semantics; constrained Windows loopback fallback. Transcript: handoff/REVIEW.md.

scope_note: Defines the full PlatformListener/PlatformStream cross-platform contract; macOS iteration implements only the unix path + trait seam + gating. Security-critical: any Windows transport must reproduce the 0600 + peer-uid guarantees. Depends on platform-compile.
